name: In Chicago, are there rules on lawyers using AI like ChatGPT?

mainEntity.name: In Chicago, are there rules on lawyers using AI like ChatGPT?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, IL ARDC requires competence, disclosure. Context: Recent opinions mandate verification, no privilege waiver. Key factors: Client consent, secure tools. Practical guidance: Ask for AI policy, verify compliance. Check ARDC site.
